## Add new chain

Template to provide information about the new chain. Only add extra information in the bottom section.

Please fill the following form:

Provide the Chain ID (Only 1 chain id per PR).
- Chain_ID: 

The chain should be listed on chainlist.org, provide the link.
- Chainlist_URL: 

Provide RPC URL for the chain (should be able to query atleast 10 requests per minute for automatic PR check).
- RPC_URL: 

Contract deployed: Confirm that the contracts are deployed on the chain, if not deploy with [safe-contracts](https://github.com/safe-global/safe-contracts).
- [ ] I confirm that the contracts are deployed

What version (1.3.0/1.4.1) of contracts are deployed? NOTE: One issue per version and one pull request per version.
- Contract_Version: 

Relevant information:
Add any other relevant information like blockexplorer, any annotation...
